title: TAMED ENDER DRAGONS (RIDEABLE)
description: You can tame and right-click to ride the ender dragon in a datapack
body:
# **DRAGONS WALKING?**
Does this add a new feature in the game that adds **TAMED ENDER DRAGONS** in Minecraft?!???How to tame them? Watch the whole video to learn, you'll also learn how to get them

They can also walk when you sneak after riding, but first, you gotta tame them with a fish!

The best part about this datapack is this is very clean in-game.
If you want to contact me for questions:
